holdings.infoBox: FBCV is an equity ETF with a total of 128 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.58%, Amazon.com at 3.87%, Exxon Mobil at 3.81%, Bank of America at 2.47%, and Cisco Systems at 2.32%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Blue Chip Value ETF (FBCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed, non-transparent fund of fundamentally-selected large-cap global value stocks. The fund utilizes the Fidelity non-transparent model. FBCV was launched on Jun 3, 2020 and is issued by Fidelity.
